intro: Minuartia lineata, also known as the striped saxifrage, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress.
